step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with bold navy blue ZONNIC logo text and green accent. Both the Z and C letters have circular halos behind them, which is not standard. Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly present at the top and bottom. The overall palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with bold navy blue ZONNIC logo text and green accent. Both the Z and C letters have circular halos behind them, which is not standard. Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly present at the top and bottom. The overall palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin), also text logo near top center
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (product tin logo), large (headline text logo)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): YES ⚠ WRONG LETTER!
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: Z
  Halo colour: solid navy blue (Z), solid green (C)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: navy blue (Z), green (C)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Description: solid white background, product tin in center

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (logo and headline), regular sans-serif (regulatory text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: New to ZONNIC? Here's how it works...

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: accent (green used for C halo and product tin edge)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a solid white background, with the ZONNIC logo in bold navy blue text and green accent. Both the Z and C letters have circular halos behind them, which is not standard for the brand. The C halo is a solid green colour, while the Z halo is solid navy blue; neither uses a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds. Regulatory elements are correctly present: the bilingual nicotine warning is at the top, the 18+ icon is at the bottom left, and the risk communication text is at the bottom. The font is a bold sans-serif, matching brand requirements, and the colour palette aligns with the Green/Mint flavour. However, the presence of a halo behind the Z letter and the lack of a gradient in the C halo on a white background are significant brand violations. The logo layout is otherwise correct, but these issues need to be addressed for full compliance.

checks_performed.detail: Nicotine warning is present at the top of the image and is bilingual (English and French).
18+ age restriction icon is present at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the product tin and in headline text.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
Both the Z and C letters have halos; the Z should not have a halo, and the C halo is not a gradient as required.
Logo is modified by adding a halo behind the Z letter, which is not permitted.
Background is solid white, matching educational content requirements.
No gradient background is used, so gradient direction and split rules do not apply.
Content is educational and uses a white background, which is acceptable.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, green, white) are used, matching the Green/Mint flavour palette.
Font is bold sans-serif, matching Santral requirements. No NRT lockup text is present.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
Halo colours do not blend into the background, and logo is not placed in any shape or container.

violations.rule_text: Don't add the halo on the Z instead of the C.
violations.issue: There is a circular halo behind the Z letter, which is not permitted. Only the C should have a halo.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the halo from the Z letter so that only the C has a circular halo.
violations.evidence: Both Z and C have halos; Z halo is navy blue.

violations.rule_text: Don't outline other letters in the logo (only C gets the halo).
violations.issue: A halo is present behind the Z letter, which is not allowed. Only the C should have a halo.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the halo from the Z letter and ensure only the C has a circular halo.

violations.rule_text: The logo should never be altered or recreated in any way.
violations.issue: Logo is altered by adding a halo behind the Z letter, which is not part of the official design.
violations.fix_suggestion: Restore the logo to its official layout with a halo only behind the C.
violations.evidence: Logo shows halos behind both Z and C.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
violations.issue: C halo is present, but the Z also has a halo, which is not allowed.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the halo from the Z letter and ensure only the C has a halo.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid green colour on a white background, but it should be a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient (primary and secondary colours) on white backgrounds.
violations.evidence: C halo is solid green, not a gradient.
